# MeepleMatch

> MeepleMatch is a swipe-based product discovery site that helps users find board games through personalized recommendations. Users answer quick preference questions, swipe through curated games (like a dating app), and get matched with their ideal picks — with affiliate links to buy on Amazon.

## Pages

- [Home](https://meeplematch.netlify.app/): Landing page explaining how MeepleMatch works — quick preferences, swipe to discover, get matched.
- [Board Games](https://meeplematch.netlify.app/board-games): Browse all 44 curated board games with ratings, player counts, complexity, and themes.
- [Start Swiping](https://meeplematch.netlify.app/swipe): The interactive swipe flow — answer 4 questions then swipe through game cards to build your taste profile.

## Categories

MeepleMatch covers board games across these categories:
- Strategy games (Terraforming Mars, Brass: Birmingham, Scythe)
- Party games (Codenames, Wavelength, Just One, Dixit)
- Cooperative games (Pandemic, Spirit Island, The Crew, Gloomhaven)
- Family games (Ticket to Ride, Catan, Azul, Cascadia, Carcassonne)
- 2-player games (7 Wonders Duel, Patchwork, Onitama, Star Realms)
- Heavy strategy (Twilight Imperium, Through the Ages, Gaia Project)

## How It Works

1. Answer 4 quick-tap questions about player count, session length, complexity preference, and theme interests.
2. Swipe through a personalized deck of board game cards — right to like, left to pass, up to super-like.
3. After 15 swipes, see your top matches with explanations of why each game fits your taste.
4. Create shareable bundles (e.g., "Family Game Night") and buy games via Amazon affiliate links.

## Data Sources

- Game metadata (player count, play time, complexity, themes, mechanics) sourced from BoardGameGeek.
- Product data (images, ratings, reviews, pricing) sourced from the Amazon Creators API.
- Recommendations powered by a deterministic scoring engine using attribute matching, behavior affinity, popularity, and exploration bonuses.
